description: Canonical development API key governance records. Values, credential file contents, local secret paths, and command lines stay out of registry data.

entries.accessMethod: Environment variable consumed by Cloudflare CLI, SDKs, or tunnel automation.
entries.rules: Prefer scoped API tokens over global keys, keep credential files out of registry data, rotate in Cloudflare Dashboard, then restart dependent services.
entries.notes: Candidate credential-location record only. Do not store or print the credential value in DevGov registry data.

entries.notes: Candidate credential-location record only. Do not store or print the credential value in DevGov registry data.

entries.rules: Prefer scoped API tokens over global keys, keep credential files out of registry data, rotate in Cloudflare Dashboard, then restart dependent services.
entries.notes: Candidate credential-location record only. Do not store or print the credential value in DevGov registry data.

entries.accessMethod: Environment variable consumed by Cloudflare CLI, SDKs, or tunnel automation.
entries.rules: Prefer scoped API tokens over global keys, keep credential files out of registry data, rotate in Cloudflare Dashboard, then restart dependent services.
entries.notes: Companion account identity for Cloudflare credential usage. Do not store related credential values in DevGov registry data.

entries.accessMethod: Environment variable consumed by Gemini or Google AI SDK clients.
entries.rules: Restrict keys in Google Cloud where supported, never commit values, rotate in AI Studio or Google Cloud Console, then restart dependent shells or services.
entries.notes: Candidate credential-location record only. Do not store or print the credential value in DevGov registry data.

entries.accessMethod: Environment variable consumed by Cloudflare CLI, SDKs, or tunnel automation.
entries.rules: Prefer scoped API tokens over global keys, keep credential files out of registry data, rotate in Cloudflare Dashboard, then restart dependent services.
entries.notes: Likely global API-key style Cloudflare credential. Review and replace with scoped API tokens where possible.

entries.accessMethod: Environment variable consumed by Jules API clients.
entries.rules: Store locally as an environment variable, never commit values, rotate in Jules settings, then restart dependent clients.
entries.notes: Candidate credential-location record only. Do not store or print the credential value in DevGov registry data.

entries.accessMethod: Environment variable consumed by NVIDIA API Catalog, NIM, or NGC clients.
entries.rules: Use personal keys for development only, never commit values, rotate in NVIDIA settings, then update dependent shells or services.
entries.notes: Candidate credential-location record only. Do not store or print the credential value in DevGov registry data.

entries.accessMethod: Environment variable consumed by OpenAI SDKs or compatible clients.
entries.rules: Use project-scoped keys where possible, never commit values, rotate in the OpenAI Platform, then update dependent shells or services.
entries.notes: Candidate credential-location record only. Do not store or print the credential value in DevGov registry data.
